title: Goal continuation plugin configuration
description: Per-plugin (global) configuration for the goal-plugin. The judge model and turn budget are owned by the @ricoyudog/pi-goal-hermes extension; this config only governs the dashboard surfaces. See change: add-goal-continuation-plugin.

enabled.description: When false, the plugin is inactive (no chip, no control). Default-enabled when the @ricoyudog/pi-goal-hermes extension is installed.
